title: Contactless reader
abstract: A contactless credential reader which comprises an anti-tamper structure, the reader further comprises two spaced apart printed circuit board substrates to at least one of which is provided integrated circuitry componentry which stores sensitive data, the integrated circuitry componentry is contained within a spatial envelope or volume, tamper detection circuitry which defines the spatial envelope, and the tamper detection circuitry comprises at least one respective conductive element which is provided on each printed circuit board substrate, wherein the conductive elements are arranged to detect a tamper event.
claims:
Claims 7 CLAIMS 1. A contactless credential reader which comprises an anti-tamper structure, the reader further comprises two spaced apart printed circuit board substrates to at least one of which is provided integrated circuitry componentry which stores sensitive data, the integrated circuitry componentry is contained within a spatial envelope or volume, tamper detection circuitry which defines the spatial envelope, and the tamper detection circuitry comprises at least one respective conductive element which is provided on each printed circuit board substrate, wherein the conductive elements are arranged to detect a tamper event. 2. A contactless reader as claimed in claim 1 in which the tamper detection circuitry having detected a tamper event is arranged to execute a tamper mitigation action or process. 3. A contactless reader as claim in claim 1 or claim 2 in which the tamper detection circuitry comprises a switch. 4. A contactless reader as claimed in 2 in which the one or more tamper mitigating actions include deleting stored sensitive data and/or disabling one or more functions of the reader. 5. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the two printed circuit board structures form a stack. 6. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim which comprises an upper PCB and a lower PCB. 7. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the conductive elements are provided on a respective surface of each printed circuit board which is directed inwardly of the envelope. 8. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which one or both of the conductive elements comprises a conductive track. 

 8 9. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the conductive elements are arranged at an angular orientation to each other. 10. A contactless reader as claimed in claim 9 in which the orientation is substantially orthogonal. 1 1. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the conductive elements are arranged in a number of linear portions/extents, spaced apart from each other but connected to form a continuous element. 12. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the two printed circuit board substrates are maintained in a spaced apart relationship by way of elongate electrical conductive elements which define opposite sides of the spatial envelope. 13. A contactless reader as claimed in any preceding claim in which the elongate electrically conductive elements comprise elastomeric connectors. 14. A contactless reader as claimed in claim 13 in which each connector comprises alternating conductive and insulating regions/extents in a rubber or elastomer matrix to produce overall anisotropic conductive properties.
